name: office-wizards
description: Guide agents through safe local Microsoft Office desktop wizard workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Safe local Office desktop wizard workflows
interface.longDescription: Office Wizards gives agents concise app-specific desktop wizard workflows for automating Microsoft Office apps on Windows with direct PowerShell COM and VBA.
defaultPrompt: Use Office Wizards to choose the right desktop wizard
Safely inspect my open Excel workbooks
Draft an Outlook message without sending it
